mapper.select: SELECT rm.room_id FROM room_members rm JOIN chat_rooms cr ON rm.room_id = cr.room_id WHERE cr.room_type = 'DIRECT' AND rm.user_id IN (#{user1}, #{user2}) GROUP BY rm.room_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT rm.user_id) = 2 AND ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM room_members WHERE room_id = rm.room_id ) = 2

SELECT cr.* FROM room_members rm JOIN chat_rooms cr ON rm.room_id = cr.room_id WHERE cr.room_type = 'DIRECT' AND cr.room_status = 'ACTIVE' AND rm.left_at IS NULL AND rm.user_id IN (#{user1}, #{user2}) GROUP BY cr.room_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT rm.user_id) = 2 AND ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM room_members rm2 WHERE rm2.room_id = cr.room_id AND rm2.left_at IS NULL ) = 2
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO room_members(room_id, user_id , role , custom_room_name,custom_room_thumbnail,member_status) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{userId}, #{role} , #{customRoomName},#{customRoomThumbnail},#{memberStatus})
INSERT INTO chat_messages(room_id, sender_id, message_text,created_at) VALUES(#{roomId}, #{senderId}, #{messageText},#{createdAt})
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT m.message_id, m.room_id, u.public_id AS sender_public_id, m.message_text, m.created_at,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM room_members rm WHERE rm.room_id = m.room_id AND rm.member_status = 'ACTIVE' AND rm.user_id != m.sender_id AND ( rm.last_read_message_id IS NULL OR rm.last_read_message_id < m.message_id ) ) AS unread_count
FROM chat_messages m
JOIN users u ON u.user_id = m.sender_id
WHERE m.room_id = #{roomId}
AND m.message_id < #{beforeMessageId}
ORDER BY m.message_id DESC LIMIT 20 ) t ORDER BY t.message_id ASC

SELECT m.message_id, m.room_id, u.public_id AS sender_public_id, m.message_text, m.created_at,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM room_members rm WHERE rm.room_id = m.room_id AND rm.user_id != m.sender_id AND ( rm.last_read_message_id IS NULL OR rm.last_read_message_id < m.message_id ) ) AS unread_count
FROM chat_messages m
JOIN users u ON u.user_id = m.sender_id
WHERE m.room_id = #{roomId}
ORDER BY m.message_id ASC

SELECT m.*,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM room_members rm WHERE rm.room_id = m.room_id AND rm.user_id != m.sender_id AND ( rm.last_read_message_id IS NULL OR rm.last_read_message_id < m.message_id ) ) AS unreadCount
FROM chat_messages m
WHERE m.room_id = #{roomId}
ORDER BY m.message_id ASC
select last_read_message_id from room_members where room_id = #{roomId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE room_members SET last_read_message_id = #{lastReadMessageId} WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select:
SELECT r.room_id AS room_id, r.room_type AS room_type, r.room_name AS room_name,
COALESCE( me.custom_room_name, CASE WHEN r.room_type = 'DIRECT' THEN ( SELECT u.nickname FROM room_members other_rm JOIN users u ON u.user_id = other_rm.user_id WHERE other_rm.room_id = r.room_id AND other_rm.user_id != me.user_id AND other_rm.left_at IS NULL LIMIT 1 ) ELSE r.room_name END ) AS display_room_name,
COUNT(DISTINCT m.message_id) AS unread_count,
( SELECT cm.message_text FROM chat_messages cm WHERE cm.room_id = r.room_id ORDER BY cm.message_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS last_message,
( SELECT cm.created_at FROM chat_messages cm WHERE cm.room_id = r.room_id ORDER BY cm.message_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS last_message_time
FROM room_members me
JOIN chat_rooms r ON r.room_id = me.room_id
LEFT JOIN chat_messages m ON m.room_id = r.room_id AND m.message_id > IFNULL(me.last_read_message_id, 0) AND m.sender_id != me.user_id
WHERE me.user_id = #{userId} AND me.left_at IS NULL AND r.room_status = 'ACTIVE'
GROUP BY r.room_id, r.room_type, r.room_name, me.custom_room_name, me.user_id, me.last_read_message_id
ORDER BY last_message_time DESC, r.room_id DESC
SELECT user_id FROM room_members WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND left_at IS NULL
